footer.tagline: Find & compare the best 3PL providers for your brand.

home.sectionDesc: Flowrid selects and provides the most comprehensive, multi-dimensional information to meet your needs, identifying the best-fit 3PL partner from our global network.
home.workspaceHeading: Bridge the operational management between brands and 3PL

detail.faqDefaultAnswer: Our AI analyzes real fulfillment data across hundreds of 3PL providers to give you the most accurate answer based on your specific product type, platform, and location requirements.
detail.nichesDesc: Product categories and industries {name} specializes in.
detail.platformsDesc: eCommerce platforms and marketplaces {name} integrates with.
detail.vasDesc: Additional services {name} provides beyond core fulfillment.
detail.locationsDesc: {name} has fulfillment centers strategically located to optimize shipping times and costs.
detail.alternativesDesc: Looking for similar 3PL providers? Here are the top alternatives based on services, specializations, and fulfillment capabilities.
detail.beFirst: Be the first to share your experience working with {name}.
detail.bottomCTADesc: Join thousands of businesses who've found their ideal logistics partners through Flowrid. Let us simplify your search.
detail.awardsDesc: Industry awards and certifications earned by {name}.
detail.topRated3PLDesc: {name} ranks in the top tier of verified fulfillment providers on Flowrid, recognized for consistent operational performance and strong brand satisfaction.
detail.ecomSpecialistDesc: Certified in multi-channel eCommerce fulfillment with demonstrated expertise across major platforms and marketplaces.
detail.qualityAssuredDesc: Verified fulfillment processes and quality control standards that meet Flowrid's quality assurance criteria.
detail.customersDesc: Brands that trust {name} with their fulfillment.
detail.overviewTemplate: {name} is a full-service third-party logistics provider headquartered in {loc}. With deep expertise in {cats} fulfillment, {name} offers comprehensive warehousing, pick-and-pack, and shipping solutions tailored to growing e-commerce brands. The company integrates seamlessly with {platforms}, enabling real-time order syncing and inventory management. Their {speed} fulfillment turnaround and {pricing} pricing make them a strong partner for brands looking to scale their direct-to-consumer operations.
detail.overviewSecondaryCats: {name} specializes in handling {cats}, with dedicated storage zones and trained staff for each product category.
detail.overviewSecondaryTech: Their technology stack includes integrations with {techList}, allowing for automated order routing, real-time inventory visibility, and comprehensive reporting.
detail.overviewSecondaryVas: Beyond core fulfillment, {name} provides value-added services including quality control inspections, custom packaging, kitting and assembly, and returns management — helping brands deliver a consistent, high-quality customer experience from checkout to doorstep.

faqItems.qCost: What are {name}'s fulfillment costs and fee structures?
faqItems.aCost: {name} offers {costDesc} pricing for fulfillment services in {stateName}. Typical costs include receiving fees, monthly storage (per pallet or per cubic foot), pick-and-pack fees per order, and outbound shipping. {name} provides customized quotes based on your specific product dimensions, order volume, and any value-added services like kitting or custom packaging. Contact them directly for an itemized quote tailored to your needs.
faqItems.qSpeed: How fast does {name} process and ship orders?
faqItems.aSpeed: {name} offers {speed} order processing from their {stateName} fulfillment center. Most orders received before the daily cutoff time (typically 12-2 PM local) ship the same day. Ground shipping from {stateName} reaches major US population centers within 1-5 business days depending on distance. Expedited shipping options are also available through their carrier network.
faqItems.aSpeedWithCity: {name} offers {speed} order processing from their {stateName} fulfillment center in {city}. Most orders received before the daily cutoff time (typically 12-2 PM local) ship the same day. Ground shipping from {stateName} reaches major US population centers within 1-5 business days depending on distance. Expedited shipping options are also available through their carrier network.
faqItems.qPlatforms: Which eCommerce platforms and tools does {name} integrate with?
faqItems.aPlatforms: {name} integrates with {platList}. Their platform integrations support real-time order syncing, automatic inventory updates, shipment tracking push-back, and multi-channel order management — ensuring your {catList} products stay synchronized across all sales channels.
faqItems.qOnboard: How quickly can a new client onboard with {name}?
faqItems.aOnboard: Typical onboarding with {name} takes 1-3 weeks depending on your product catalog complexity and integration requirements. The process includes account setup, platform integration testing, inventory receiving and slotting, and staff training on any special handling requirements for your {catList} products. Rush onboarding may be available for time-sensitive launches.
faqItems.qCompare: How does {name} compare to other {stateName} 3PL providers?
faqItems.aCompare: {name} differentiates itself through {speed} fulfillment speed, {costDesc} pricing, and specialized experience with {catList}. Their ops score of {rating} reflects strong performance across fulfillment accuracy, speed, and integration capabilities. For brands seeking a reliable {stateName}-based 3PL with {firstPlatform} integration expertise, {name} is a strong candidate worth evaluating alongside alternatives.

detail.metaDescription: View detailed information, reviews, and capabilities of this 3PL provider.
detail.heroFallbackDesc: {name} is a {state}-based fulfillment provider offering comprehensive warehousing and logistics services for e-commerce brands.
detail.technologyEmptyDesc: Technology integration information coming soon. Contact {name} for details about their tech stack.
detail.platformIntegrationsDesc: {name} integrates with these eCommerce platforms and marketplaces:

techDesc.shopify: Industry-leading eCommerce platform with real-time order and inventory sync
techDesc.amazon: FBA Prep, Seller Central integration, and multi-channel fulfillment
techDesc.woocommerce: Open-source WordPress eCommerce with flexible fulfillment automation
techDesc.bigcommerce: Enterprise-grade eCommerce with native multi-warehouse routing
techDesc.magento: Adobe Commerce platform with advanced order management APIs
techDesc.netsuite: Oracle ERP with integrated warehouse and order management
techDesc.shipstation: Multi-carrier shipping platform with rate shopping and batch processing
techDesc.walmart: Walmart Marketplace and WFS fulfillment integration
techDesc.ebay: eBay marketplace order management and fulfillment
techDesc.wayfair: Home goods and furniture marketplace fulfillment

saas.noAccount: Don't have an account? Create one
saas.alreadyHave: Already have an account? Sign in
saas.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
saas.autoSyncDesc: Auto-sync orders, inventory & tracking in real-time
saas.howToGetShopifyToken: How to get your Shopify token:
saas.settingsGuideStep1: 1. Log into your Shopify admin → Settings → Apps and sales channels
saas.settingsGuideStep2: 2. Click Develop apps → Create an app (name it anything)
saas.settingsGuideStep3: 3. Configure Admin API scopes → check read_orders, write_orders, read_products
saas.settingsGuideStep4: 4. Click Install app → copy the Admin API access token (starts with shpat_)
saas.settingsGuideStep5: 5. Paste the token below and click Test Connection
saas.pleaseEnterStoreAndToken: Please enter store name and token
saas.name: Name
saas.pleaseFillAllFields: Please fill all fields (from/to must differ)
saas.noLocations: No locations yet — add your first location above

account.desc: Manage orders, inventory, billing, integrations, and provider decisions.

menuItems.overview: Review your brand operations workspace and next actions.
menuItems.orders: Track ecommerce orders and fulfillment status.
menuItems.products: Manage SKUs, product attributes, and catalog signals.
menuItems.inventory: Monitor stock levels and inventory health.
menuItems.inbound: Plan inbound shipments and ASN activity.
menuItems.shipping: Compare rates and manage outbound shipping actions.
menuItems.analytics: Review order, inventory, and warehouse performance trends.
menuItems.billing: Review invoices, usage, and fulfillment costs.
menuItems.integrations: Connect Shopify and ecommerce data sources for better matching.
menuItems.automations: Configure brand-side order, inventory, and notification rules.
menuItems.auditLog: Review account, order, inventory, and integration changes.
menuItems.myRFQs: Track requests for quotation and matched 3PL proposals.
menuItems.settings: Manage your profile, email, password, and preferences.

automation.title: Automations
automation.desc: Prepare brand-side automation rules for order notifications, low-stock alerts, and RFQ readiness workflows.
automation.emptyDesc: Once your store is connected, create brand-side rules for notifications and decision workflows without touching warehouse execution automations.

sections.brandSafeTriggersDesc: Automations should react to brand data events, not warehouse worker tasks.
sections.suggestedActionsDesc: Keep actions focused on visibility and decision support.
sections.excludedControlsDesc: Warehouse task automation remains in the operator SaaS system.

audit.title: Audit Log
audit.desc: Review brand account changes such as integrations, RFQs, saved providers, and future synced data events.

sections.trackedChangesDesc: The audit log should explain brand account activity in plain language.
sections.operationalConfidenceDesc: Audit history helps teams understand what changed and when.
sections.scopeBoundaryDesc: This view does not expose internal warehouse staff or operator task logs.

audit.emptyDesc: Brand account audit events will appear here as integrations, RFQs, saved providers, and settings change.

compare.nextBestActionDesc: Build a shortlist before requesting quotes so provider outreach stays focused.
compare.brandSafeScopeDesc: This page stays inside the account workspace and does not reuse warehouse operator workflows.
